name: Nordstrom, Inc.
description: Nordstrom, Inc. is a leading American luxury department store chain that offers a wide range of apparel, shoes, cosmetics, and accessories for men, women, and children. Founded in 1901 and headquartered in Seattle, Washington, the company operates through its full-line stores, Nordstrom Rack off-price retail locations, and its e-commerce platform. Known for its commitment to customer service and high-quality fashion, Nordstrom serves as a prominent retailer in the fashion industry, providing a curated shopping experience both in-store and online across the United States and Canada.
